nodes.name: log.json
nodes.summary: Design-skill session log recording Hallmark redesign passes over project HTML artifacts and the dashboard theme.

nodes.name: config.toml
nodes.summary: Streamlit server/theme settings for the dashboard (fonts, colors matching the editorial theme).

nodes.name: CITATION.bib
nodes.summary: BibTeX citation entry for citing this benchmarking framework.

nodes.name: CITATION.cff
nodes.summary: Citation File Format metadata (authors, title, version) for the repository.

nodes.name: data.py
nodes.summary: Streamlit-free, unit-tested data layer for the dashboard: prefers results_512/analysis over results/analysis, rebuilds judge-primary interpretations from multiple_comparisons.json via classify_pair_change (not the v2-proxy pair_interpretations), guards protected results dirs, and generates schema-validated new-pair configs.

nodes.name: analysis_dir
nodes.summary: Resolves the preferred analysis tree (results_512/analysis first, falling back to results/analysis).

nodes.name: is_protected_results_dir
nodes.summary: Refuses writes into protected results trees (immutable TC1 artifacts), case-insensitively.

nodes.name: resolve_execution_dir
nodes.summary: Resolves a safe output directory for dashboard-launched runs, blocking protected paths.

nodes.name: safe_generated_config_name
nodes.summary: Sanitizes generated config filenames against path escapes.

nodes.name: precision_sweep_long
nodes.summary: Reshapes the precision-sweep JSON into a long dataframe for plotting.

nodes.name: judge_agreement_df
nodes.summary: Loads judge-vs-regex agreement (kappa) tables into a dataframe.

nodes.name: contrasts_index
nodes.summary: Indexes multiple_comparisons.json contrasts by pair and benchmark.

nodes.name: judge_primary_interpretations
nodes.summary: Rebuilds pair interpretation labels judge-primary using classify_pair_change over the preferred tree's contrasts.

nodes.name: build_new_pair_config
nodes.summary: Builds and validates a runnable YAML config (plus sbatch) for a user-added model pair.

nodes.name: ProtectedResultsDirError
nodes.summary: Raised when a write would target a protected results tree.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Top-level package marker exposing the ethical_benchmark version and namespace.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package marker for the analysis subpackage.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package marker for the SLURM cluster subpackage.

nodes.name: constants.py
nodes.summary: Shared constants: DEFAULT_SEED=42, generation defaults (max_new_tokens 128, temperature 0.0), and benchmark batch sizes.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Lazy-import barrel for the legacy evaluators (toxicity/bias/factuality) so heavyweight ML deps load only when used; not part of the default quantization pipeline.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Lazy-import barrel exposing the model layer (HFModelLoader, TextGenerator, ModelSpec) without importing torch at package import time.

nodes.name: build_agent_harness_architecture_doc.py
nodes.summary: python-docx builder for the agent-harness architecture Word document: styled tables, callouts, two-column cards, and scenario walkthroughs.

nodes.name: build_doc
nodes.summary: Assembles the full harness-architecture document section by section.

nodes.name: build_agentic_report.js
nodes.summary: docx-js builder for the agentic-workflow meetup report, with inline SVG figures (ladder, loop, harness, memory, tests) rasterized to PNG.

nodes.name: build_fyp_report_v2.js
nodes.summary: Archived FYP report builder v2 (superseded by v5).

nodes.name: build_fyp_report_v3.js
nodes.summary: Archived FYP report builder v3 (superseded by v5).

nodes.name: build_fyp_report_v4.js
nodes.summary: Archived FYP report builder v4 (superseded by v5 in the D41 512-primary re-base).

nodes.name: build_fyp_report_v5.js
nodes.summary: CANONICAL FYP report builder (D41, 512-primary): docx-js source generating docs/FYP_Report_2026-07-01_v5.docx via `make report`. The script is the source of truth; the docx is the artifact and is never hand-edited.

nodes.name: build_fyp_report.js
nodes.summary: Archived first-generation FYP report builder (superseded; kept for provenance — v5 is canonical).

nodes.name: build_fyp_thesis_v2.js
nodes.summary: Archived thesis builder v2 (superseded by v4).

nodes.name: build_fyp_thesis_v3.js
nodes.summary: Archived thesis builder v3 (superseded by v4).

nodes.name: build_fyp_thesis_v4.js
nodes.summary: CANONICAL thesis builder (D43 512 mirror): generates docs/FYP_Thesis_2026-07-02_v4.docx via `make thesis`, claim-locked and adversarially verified.

nodes.name: build_fyp_thesis.js
nodes.summary: Archived first thesis builder (superseded by v4; archived docx carries a banner).

nodes.name: generate_agent_harness_architecture_diagram.py
nodes.summary: Generates the agent-harness architecture diagram as SVG and editable draw.io XML (cards, pills, edge routing).

nodes.name: generate_architecture_diagram.py
nodes.summary: Generates the system architecture diagram (pipeline, benchmarks, analysis layers) as SVG and draw.io XML for the report.

nodes.name: generate_integrated_architecture_diagram.py
nodes.summary: Generates the integrated architecture diagram combining the benchmark pipeline with the agent-harness contract band, folder tree, and skills, as SVG and draw.io XML.
